name: xUnit.net
description: Free, open-source, community-focused unit-testing tool for the .NET Framework, .NET Core and .NET 5+, the default testing framework in new dotnet CLI templates.

seo.title: xUnit.net — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: xUnit.net: Free, open-source, community-focused unit-testing tool for the .NET Framework, .NET Core and .NET 5+, the default testing framework in new dotnet CLI

when_to_use: Default .NET unit testing framework for dotnet CLI projects
Parallel test collection execution by default
Clean test isolation with constructor/dispose lifecycle

pros: Default in new dotnet CLI templates
review.verdict: The right default for new .NET projects thanks to tight dotnet CLI integration and parallel-first design.
review.best_for: New .NET projects picking a framework aligned with Microsoft defaults
review.not_for: Teams with heavy NUnit investment in parameterized test suites
